---
title: "MC_history"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/MC_history.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/MC_history.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `generate_mc_history` {#generate_mc_history}

```python
def generate_mc_history(n_steps=10000, dt=0.01, theta_start=1.0, theta_end=0.01)
```

Generate a Monte Carlo history with slowly vanishing autocorrelation.

Parameters:
    n_steps (int): Number of time steps.
    dt (float): Time step size.
    theta_start (float): Initial value of the decay rate.
    theta_end (float): Final value of the decay rate.

Returns:
    np.ndarray: The Monte Carlo history.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/MC_history.py#L18){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
